idea-plugin.name: FAH Failure Sound
idea-plugin.description:
Hear build and run results instantly.

FAH Failure Sound plays configurable audio cues for key IDE events, so you can stop watching output tabs and still notice failures, warnings, and successful runs.

  • Build events: failed, warning, succeeded
  • Run/Debug events: failed, succeeded
  • External build events: Gradle failed, Maven failed
  • Per-event sound source: bundled, custom file, or no sound
  • Per-event max playback duration, global volume, debounce, and optional notifications
  • Custom local .mp3 and .wav files from your IDE config folder
  • No external services, no extra IDE plugins, and no internal JetBrains APIs required

Useful for quick feedback loops while coding, especially when builds run in the background.

Source code | Issue tracker
idea-plugin.change-notes:
1.0.5

  • Replaced Marketplace/plugin manager description Markdown with supported HTML formatting
  • Improved listing copy for clearer searchability and feature summary
  • Confirmed the plugin stays local-only and does not depend on internal JetBrains APIs
